prompt: Review PR #4495 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds an RC subscription bridge between the tracer and the OpenFeature provider.

assertions.text: Flags that forwardingCallback and/or AttachCallback invoke external callbacks while holding rcState.Lock, risking deadlocks
Notes that rcState.subscribed is not reset when the tracer stops and restarts, leading to stale state
Flags use of internal.BoolEnv instead of the internal/env package for environment variable access
Flags ResetForTest or similar test helpers in non-test files (shipped in production builds)
Notes duplicate FFE product name constant across packages (ffeProductName and FFEProductName)
Flags broadening goleak.IgnoreAnyFunction entries that affect the whole test package
